title: Sohreyan Da Pind Aa Gaya
overview: Lovers Raja and Roopi send a matchmaker to Roopi’s house to pitch Raja as the perfect match for her. Things take an unexpected turn when the matchmaker fixes Roopi's alliance with another man.
